content: PIX static QR code (BR Code) uses EMV TLV format. Fields required: ID00=01 (format indicator), ID01=11 (static), ID26 containing sub00=BR.GOV.BCB.PIX and sub01={chave_pix}, ID52=0000, ID53=986 (BRL), ID54={valor} optional, ID58=BR, ID59={nome max 25}, ID60={cidade max 15}, ID62 containing sub05=*** (txid), ID63={CRC16 4-hex chars}. CRC algorithm: CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE, polynomial 0x1021, initial value 0xFFFF. All chars uppercase, no accents. Complete string is one continuous payload ending with 6304{crc}.
